zh.Grave, Brabant, Netherlands: 荷蘭努-布拉班特格拉福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jutta van Borssele於1239年出生在荷蘭藍德格斯時，她的父親Peter I VAN BORSELEN20歲，母親Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGEN13歲。她於1271年10月30日與Heer Hendrick II van der Lecke在荷蘭-拉藍德蒙斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1295年享年56歲。

zh-hans.Grave, Brabant, Netherlands: 荷兰努-布拉班特格拉福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jutta van Borssele于1239年出生在荷兰藍德格斯时，她的父亲Peter I VAN BORSELEN20岁，母亲Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGEN13岁。她于1271年10月30日与Heer Hendrick II van der Lecke在荷兰-拉藍德蒙斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1295年享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Jutta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Judith  , also used as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Jutta van Borssele was born in 1239, in Goes, Zeeland, Netherlands, her father, Peter I VAN BORSELEN, was 20 and her mother, Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGEN, was 13. She married Heer Hendrick II van der Lecke on 30 October 1271, in Monster, South Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1295, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jutta van Borssele est née en 1239, à Goes, Zélande, Pays-Bas, son père, Peter I VAN BORSELEN, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGEN, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Heer Hendrick II van der Lecke le 30 octobre 1271, à Monster, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1295, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jutta van Borssele 1239 in Goes, Seeland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter I VAN BORSELEN 20 und ihre Mutter Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGEN 13. Sie hat am 30. Oktober 1271 in Monster, Südholland, Niederlande Heer Hendrick II van der Lecke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1295 im Alter von 56 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jutta van Borssele è nata il nel 1239 nel Goes, Zelanda, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Peter I VAN BORSELEN, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGEN, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Heer Hendrick II van der Lecke il 30 ottobre 1271, nel Monster, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1295, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Goes, Goes, Zeeland, Netherlands: オランダゼエランドゴス
ja.Monster, Zuid-Holland, Nederland: オランダズイド-hオランドモンスター
ja.Grave, Brabant, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-ブラバントグラブ
ja.Goes, Zeeland, Nederland: オランダゼエランドゴス
ja.Martin, Žilinský kraj, Slovakia: スロバキアマルティン
ja.lifeSummary: Jutta van Borsseleが1239年にオランダゼエランドゴスで生まれた時，父Peter I VAN BORSELENは20歳，母Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGENは13歳であった。1271年10月30日にオランダズイド-hオランドモンスターでHeer Hendrick II van der Leckeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1295年に56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jutta van Borssele(이)가 1239년 네덜란드 제랜드 고스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter I VAN BORSELEN(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGEN(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1271년 10월 30일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 몬스터에서 Heer Hendrick II van der Lecke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Grave, Brabant, Netherlands: Grave, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jutta van Borssele nasceu em 1239, em Goes, Zelandia, Países Baixos, seu pai, Peter I VAN BORSELEN, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGEN, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Heer Hendrick II van der Lecke em 30 de outubro de 1271, em Monster, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1295, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jutta van Borssele родилась в 1239 г. в местности гоесь, зиланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Peter I VAN BORSELEN было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGEN, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heer Hendrick II van der Lecke 30 октября 1271 г. в местности монстир, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1295 г. в возрасте 56 лет.

es.Grave, Brabant, Netherlands: Grave, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jutta van Borssele nació en 1239, en Goes, Zeeland, Países Bajos, su papá, Peter I VAN BORSELEN, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Hadewich VAN CRUIJNINGEN, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Heer Hendrick II van der Lecke el 30 de octubre de 1271, en Monster, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1295, a la edad de 56 años.
